.internal-embed.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-container.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(240, 240, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(249, 249, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(208, 208, 208) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(240, 240, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(240, 240, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(240, 240, 240) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(245, 245, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
